name: search_corporate_ip
description: Proprietary IP Scanner — searches the isolated corporate monorepo for internal APIs, shared components, and corporate architectures. MUST be used instead of web searches for internal code.

tools.name: ripgrep_corporate
tools.description: Fast text search across corporate monorepo. Use for string/regex pattern matching.

tools.name: ast_grep_corporate
tools.description: Structural AST code parsing across corporate monorepo. Use for semantic code pattern detection.

system_instruction: Execute search strictly against './external_repos/corp-monorepo'. Do not search the global workspace. If the directory is empty, prompt the user to clone their corporate monorepo securely via their local authorized GitHub CLI (SSH transport only).
